notes: Split screen fixes: your reaction now shows from the very first frame of every step, and swapped reactions start and end clean with no stray frame from another clip.
_urls: urls are GitHub Release assets (stable, public, direct .exe/.dmg) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. Assets use customer-friendly names (Remixa-Windows.exe / Remixa-Mac.dmg); the release TAG carries the version. mac is EMPTY this round (the notarized dmg is still building in the cloud-Mac CI) so Mac users see no update banner; when that dmg lands, upload it to the v2.9.20 release and fill this block.
